task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a folder named 'Meridian-Q4' in the email client's sidebar or folder list.

task_completion.description: Verify 5 emails were moved into the 'Meridian-Q4' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the 'Meridian-Q4' folder to see multiple (ideally 5) emails listed inside it, or look for a selection of 5 emails being dragged/moved from the Inbox.

task_completion.description: Verify the draft email to the client (j.chen@meridian-corp.com) is prepared correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open compose window or a saved draft addressed to 'j.chen@meridian-corp.com'. The subject should contain 'Thank You', 'Q4', and 'Planning'. The body must contain the words 'thank you' and 'meeting'.

task_completion.description: Verify the draft email to engineering (engineering@mycompany.com) is prepared correctly with action items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open compose window or a saved draft addressed to 'engineering@mycompany.com'. The subject should contain 'Action Items' and 'Meridian'. The body must contain a bulleted list with at least 3 distinct bullet points.

task_completion.description: Verify the draft email to the director (director@mycompany.com) is prepared correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open compose window or a saved draft addressed to 'director@mycompany.com'. The subject should contain 'Meeting Summary' and 'Meridian'. The body must contain the words 'meridian' and 'next step' (or 'next steps').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical email client rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show an email application interface (like Thunderbird or Evolution) being used to create folders, move emails, and compose drafts, not a terminal window using commands like 'mkdir' or 'echo'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not actually send the emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: The emails should be visible as open compose windows or saved in the 'Drafts' folder. There should be no evidence of clicking 'Send' or the emails appearing in the 'Sent' folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application and didn't just write the text in a notepad.
integrity.visual_evidence: The drafts must be composed within the email client's specific message composition windows, showing standard email fields (To, Subject, Body).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Folder required: 'Meridian-Q4'. Emails to move: 5. Draft 1: To 'j.chen@meridian-corp.com', Subject keywords: 'Thank You', 'Q4', 'Planning', Body keywords: 'thank you', 'meeting'. Draft 2: To 'engineering@mycompany.com', Subject keywords: 'Action Items', 'Meridian', Body requirements: 3+ bullet points. Draft 3: To 'director@mycompany.com', Subject keywords: 'Meeting Summary', 'Meridian', Body keywords: 'meridian', 'next step'. All text checks are case-insensitive.
